response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong senior-level software engineering fundamentals with proven expertise in shipping production systems, architecture, and TDD practices, the role requires deep specialization in Java, Kotlin, Spring, and IDE/language tooling—areas not central to his career. His recent trajectory (2021–present) has focused on TypeScript/Node.js and AI infrastructure, moving away from JVM ecosystem work. His only relevant JVM experience (2016–2018 at Altom/National Instruments) is dated and vague, with no demonstrated Spring framework, enterprise framework, or IDE tooling expertise.
strengths: Senior-level systems thinking with proven ability to design, own, and ship complex end-to-end features at scale
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, architecture, and mentoring through workshops and courses
Polyglot engineer demonstrating language adaptability and deep technical breadth across embedded, web, and systems work
concerns: Career trajectory over the past 4+ years heavily favors TypeScript/Node.js and AI infrastructure with no demonstrated hands-on Java/Kotlin development since 2018
No experience with Spring ecosystem, enterprise frameworks (Quarkus, Hibernate), or enterprise framework integration—core to the role
No background in IDE development, language tooling, build systems, or application server integration—the specific technical domain expertise this role requires

key_factors.factor: No IDE or language tooling experience
Strong senior-level engineering fundamentals and craftsmanship
